vulnerability.reference: Resource-limited edge devices with no fallback verification for embedding quality
vulnerability.generated: Users depend on accurate graph-based recommendations without the ability to detect or mitigate embedding errors from coarsening.

impact.reference: Degraded recommendations cause user frustration and potential leakage of sensitive data through mis-grouping
impact.generated: Users experience degraded recommendation quality, leading to poor decision-making and reduced trust in the application.

dose_response.reference: Coarsening subgraphs into node representations discards fine-grained connectivity, introducing artifacts that in memory-efficient GNNs on edge devices cause degraded recommendations and potential data leakage when resource-limited devices lack verification.
dose_response.generated: Coarsening subgraphs into node representations discards fine-grained connectivity, introducing embedding inaccuracies that, through edge-based inference applications, trigger users' dependence on accurate recommendations without error detection, leading to degraded recommendation quality, poor decisions, and reduced trust.
